purpose: Bootstrap module for the containers group; installs Docker Engine from the official apt repo (skipped if Docker Desktop integration is already present), enables the daemon via systemd, adds the user to the docker group, and installs the devcontainer CLI via npm.
invariants: If docker is already on PATH (e.g. Docker Desktop WSL integration), the engine install step is entirely skipped
The docker group membership change requires a logout/login (or newgrp docker) to take effect
devcontainer CLI is installed via npm_global into the user prefix (~/.local/bin), requiring no sudo
manifest_add for docker and docker-compose is guarded by has docker; devcontainer by has devcontainer
gotchas: If the OS codename has no matching Docker apt repo dist, the install falls back to 'bookworm' — may install a mismatched version on non-Debian Ubuntu
_APT_UPDATED is explicitly reset to 0 after adding the Docker repo to force a fresh apt-get update before installing Docker packages
systemd enablement is silently skipped on systems without /run/systemd/system (e.g. bare WSL without systemd=true in /etc/wsl.conf) — the user must start dockerd manually
docker-compose manifest entry is recorded as the Compose v2 plugin (invoked as 'docker compose', not the standalone v1 binary)

key_functions.name: containers_docker_engine
key_functions.summary: Adds the Docker official apt repo for the current OS codename and installs docker-ce, cli, containerd, buildx, and compose plugins — skipped if docker already exists on PATH

key_functions.name: containers_docker_service
key_functions.summary: Enables and starts the docker daemon via systemd if /run/systemd/system is present; otherwise logs a warning with WSL and native Linux instructions

key_functions.name: containers_docker_group
key_functions.summary: Creates the docker group if absent and adds the current user, enabling rootless docker after next login

key_functions.name: containers_record_manifest
key_functions.summary: Upserts manifest entries for docker, docker-compose, and devcontainer if their binaries are present
